title: Passive income project
author: Walker7410
selftext:
I started a part-time project trading crypto currency. I have always wanted to trade, but was always afraid to start. This company makes it easy with Ai. The first gains are minimal, as you progress they become much higher.
This is a project by BFC AI Company. AI quantitative trading refers to the company's use of artificial intelligence to detect price differences for the same cryptocurrency across major exchanges, allowing for buying low and selling high to generate profits, split 50% for the members and 50% for the company. This project has three benefits: the first is that it can be completed in just 10 minutes a day without affecting work or life; the second is that the entry barrier is very low, starting from a minimum of $51-60. Keep in mind that this is not a membrship fee, all money put in, is for your own trading; the third is that this project is a sustainable long-term business that will provide members with substantial passive income.
This is a low-barrier part-time project that can bring opportunities to many people.
I am happy to send any information to anyone interested in learning more.

comments.author: No_Edge2098
comments.body: sounds chill till it’s 10 minutes a day turning into customer support for your missing funds tread careful fam

replies.author: Walker7410
replies.body: I hear you. You can google it to find out what it is about. But thank you, I do appreciate the concern.

comments.author: No_Homework_4110
comments.body: One platform I found helpful for managing returns and earning interest on idle assets is Coindepo. It complements AI trading projects well since you can park your profits there and still grow them passively.

comments.author: Walker7410
comments.body: To get started now, use my referral link. If you have issues, I would be happy to walk you through. https://m.bfcai.cc/#/register?code=efZRdIjv

replies.author: YesIAmYoux
replies.body: Hey 👋🏼. Can you make a withdrawal right now from there? 😬

replies.author: Tall_Marketing_5544
replies.body: Buen dia, desde el 15 de marzo 2026 no me aprueban el retiro, estamos 04 de abril y nada, a alguien mas tiene problemas con retiros BFCAI,?  y tampoco responde atención al cliente, tengo a todo mi equipo con esos problemas. Creo que ya llego a su fin.

replies.author: YesIAmYoux
replies.body: Everyone in BFCAI is having that problem. Honestly, I also think it has come to an end. The most important thing is not to bring more people in under you.
